'''zhapuvu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:iarovization|iarovization]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-p-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iarovization|iarovization]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zhapuvu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæpivith|zhæpivith]] || [[word:zhæpivij|zhæpivij]] || [[word:zhæpivish|zhæpivish]] || [[word:zhæpivi|zhæpivi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhapupuvuth|zhapupuvuth]] || [[word:zhapupuvuj|zhapupuvuj]] || [[word:zhapupuvush|zhapupuvush]] || [[word:zhapupuvu|zhapupuvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhapuvuth|zhapuvuth]] || [[word:zhapuvuj|zhapuvuj]] || [[word:zhapuvush|zhapuvush]] || [[word:zhapuvu|zhapuvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhapufvufth|zhapufvufth]] || [[word:zhapufvufj|zhapufvufj]] || [[word:zhapufvufsh|zhapufvufsh]] || [[word:zhapufvuf|zhapufvuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhapuvuthu|zhapuvuthu]] || [[word:zhapuvuju|zhapuvuju]] || [[word:zhapuvushu|zhapuvushu]] || [[word:zhapuvuku|zhapuvuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhapuvuth|zhapuvuth]] || [[word:zhapuvuj|zhapuvuj]] || [[word:zhapuvush|zhapuvush]] || [[word:zhapuvu|zhapuvu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhapuvuthul|zhapuvuthul]] || [[word:zhapuvujul|zhapuvujul]] || [[word:zhapuvushul|zhapuvushul]] || [[word:zhapuvukul|zhapuvukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhapuvuuthuthu|zhapuvuuthuthu]] || [[word:zhapuvuujuju|zhapuvuujuju]] || [[word:zhapuvuushushu|zhapuvuushushu]] || [[word:zhapuvuuku|zhapuvuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhapuvuthun|zhapuvuthun]] || [[word:zhapuvujun|zhapuvujun]] || [[word:zhapuvushun|zhapuvushun]] || [[word:zhapuvukun|zhapuvukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhapuvuthuoro|zhapuvuthuoro]] || [[word:zhapuvujuoro|zhapuvujuoro]] || [[word:zhapuvushuoro|zhapuvushuoro]] || [[word:zhapuvukuoro|zhapuvukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d5728ff}}
